title: post api auth signup should register new user successfully
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signup endpoint to ensure it registers a new user with valid email, password, and name, returning 201 Created with user id.

title: post api auth signin should authenticate user and return jwt
description: Test the POST /api/auth/signin endpoint with valid credentials to verify it returns 200 OK with a JWT token for authenticated sessions.

title: post api auth logout should logout authenticated user
description: Test the POST /api/auth/logout endpoint with a valid Authorization token to ensure it logs out the user and returns 200 OK.

title: get api users find should return current user profile
description: Test the GET /api/users/find endpoint with a valid Authorization token to retrieve the current authenticated user's profile, returning 200 OK.

title: put api users id should update user profile
description: Test the PUT /api/users/:id endpoint with a valid Authorization token and valid update payload to update the user's profile, returning 200 OK with updated profile.

title: post api project should create new project
description: Test the POST /api/project/ endpoint with a valid Authorization token and project payload to create a new project, returning 201 Created with project id.

title: get api project id should return project details
description: Test the GET /api/project/:id endpoint with a valid Authorization token to retrieve project details, returning 200 OK.

title: patch api project id should update project details
description: Test the PATCH /api/project/:id endpoint with a valid Authorization token and update payload to modify project details, returning 200 OK.

title: delete api project id should delete project
description: Test the DELETE /api/project/:id endpoint with a valid Authorization token to delete the specified project, returning 204 No Content.

title: post api community post should create community post
description: Test the POST /api/community/post endpoint with a valid Authorization token and content payload to create a community post, returning 201 Created with post id.
